title: Senior Plant Manager at Apollo Tyres

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Apollo Tyres
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? Apollo Tyres in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Apollo Tyres:
Apollo Tyres is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Tyres!
